global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and interactive elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a service with a special offer.

elements.label: green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green abstract background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: central graphic element
elements.description: A large, light green rectangular shape positioned centrally, suggesting a focal point for content.

elements.label: circular shape
elements.description: A soft, circular shape in a lighter shade of green, adding visual interest to the composition.

elements.label: secondary rectangular shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape in a light green hue, positioned centrally to complement the main subject.

elements.label: top left logo
elements.description: A small logo or icon located at the top left corner, visually distinct against the background.

elements.label: top right icon
elements.description: A small icon positioned at the top right corner, adding to the overall design without overwhelming it.

elements.label: unknown element
elements.description: A small, undefined element located centrally, possibly serving a decorative or functional purpose.

elements.label: main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'FluxStream' at the top, prominently displayed to capture attention.

elements.label: promotional text
elements.description: Text stating 'Exclusive tonight Start free today' in a clear, readable font, positioned centrally below the headline.

elements.label: call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom reading 'Get offer', designed to encourage user interaction.

elements.label: price display
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€19.99' in a clear, bold font, located at the bottom left to attract attention.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by promotional text in the center, with a call to action button at the bottom.
